name: Bending Destiny
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>運</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>湾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>曲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate only if all face-up monsters you control are "Fortune Lady" monsters. Negate the activation of a Spell or Trap Card, or the Normal Summon of a monster, and remove that card from play. The card removed from play by this effect is returned to its owner's hand during the End Phase.
eff: Activate only if all face-up monsters you control are "Fortune Lady" monsters. Negate the activation of a Spell or Trap Card, or the Normal Summon of a monster, and remove that card from play. The card removed from play by this effect is returned to its owner's hand during the End Phase.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
